installCommand: git clone https://github.com/flutter/flutter.git --depth 1 -b stable .flutter-sdk && ./.flutter-sdk/bin/flutter config --enable-web && ./.flutter-sdk/bin/flutter pub get
buildCommand: git clone https://github.com/flutter/flutter.git -b stable --depth 1 && export PATH="$PATH:`pwd`/flutter/bin" && flutter pub get && flutter build web --release --dart-define=API_BASE_URL=$API_BASE_URL --dart-define=GEMINI_API_KEY=$GEMINI_API_KEY --dart-define=APP_WEB_URL=$APP_WEB_URL
